summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ObaidTradez Phase 1 & 2 features: Quality-focused trading signals with confluence requirements, investment engine with balanced scoring. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working.

issues: Nested button warning: watchlist button is inside card button element - causes HTML validation warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Auth access code works correctly
Backend: /api/trading/scan returns data with all categories
Backend: Trading scan returns top_trades section
Backend: Top trades include entry_zone, stop_loss, take_profit, risk_reward
Backend: R:R ratio >= 2.0 for all top trades
Backend: Diagnostics panel data (stocks_scanned, signals_generated, excluded_count, excluded_reasons, filters_applied)
Backend: Trading categories have reasonable counts
Backend: /api/trading/analyze/{symbol} works correctly
Backend: /api/investments/scan returns all categories (Hot, Bullish, Undervalued, Watch, Bearish)
Backend: Investment signals include bull_case, bear_case, reasoning
Backend: /api/investments/browse returns paginated data (305 stocks)
Backend: /api/investments/filters returns filter options
Backend: /api/watchlist GET returns list
Backend: /api/watchlist POST/DELETE add/remove works
Backend: /api/watchlist/check/{symbol} works
Backend: /api/prices/batch returns prices
Backend: /api/prices/{symbol} returns single price
Frontend: Trading page loads with Top Trades Today section
Frontend: Top Trades show Entry, Stop Loss, Target, R:R prominently
Frontend: Diagnostics panel shows stocks scanned (35), signals generated (4), excluded (31)
Frontend: Diagnostics shows exclusion reasons (e.g., AAPL: Low confluence score)
Frontend: Diagnostics shows filters applied (Min Volume, Min Price, Min ATR%, Min R:R, Confluence)
Frontend: Trading categories tabs show counts (Hot: 2, Breakout: 0, Momentum: 0, High Volume: 0, Watch: 2)
Frontend: Investments page loads with 305 stocks analyzed
Frontend: Investment categories populated (Hot: 15, Bullish: 15, Undervalued: 15, Watch: 15, Bearish: 16)
Frontend: Investment signals show bull_case, bear_case, reasoning when expanded
Frontend: Investment signals show Score Breakdown, Valuation Summary, Business Quality, Growth Profile
Frontend: Watchlist page loads with 5 stocks
Frontend: Watchlist shows price, change, signal, sector, upside, confidence
Frontend: Live prices indicator shows on all pages
Frontend: No critical console errors on Trading or Investments pages
critical_code_review_comments: Trading engine uses strict confluence filters (momentum + volume + structure) - working correctly
Minimum R:R ratio of 2.0 enforced - all top trades show 1:2.5
Diagnostics panel provides transparency on signal generation process
Investment engine uses balanced factor weights (valuation: 20%, quality: 25%, growth: 20%, financial_strength: 20%, risk: 15%)
Investment signals include comprehensive bull_case, bear_case, and reasoning
Minor: Nested button HTML warning in Trading.jsx (line 289) - watchlist button inside card button
seed_data_creation: Existing watchlist items: NVDA, MSFT, AAPL, GOOGL + others
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1 & 2 features verified working: 1) Trading Signals shows Top Trades Today with entry/stop/target/R:R, Diagnostics panel with exclusion reasons, 4 signals from 35 stocks scanned. 2) Investment Ideas shows 305 stocks with proper categorization (Hot:15, Bullish:15, Undervalued:15, Watch:15, Bearish:16), signals include bull_case, bear_case, reasoning. 3) Watchlist add/remove works correctly. Live prices streaming works on all pages. Minor HTML validation warning for nested buttons in Trading.jsx doesn't affect functionality.

known_issues.nested_button_warning: HTML validation warning for nested button in Trading.jsx - doesn't affect functionality
